I have learnt throughout my recent journey the importance of striking the balance between intuition and structure for optimal performance. Too much structure suffocates divergent thinking, creativity and becomes a roadblock for tapping into flow state and achieving what we call deep work consistently. Too much chaos becomes unmanageable and without structure and order we drift into the lack of direction and when we don’t have the end goal and the intentionality behind what we are doing we are like a ship drifting at sea. Set a goal, a destination port but never be afraid of going through the storm and immersing yourself into the chaos in order to bring forth the rejuvenating powers from it embodying the heroic attitude, the heroic ethos must be our anchor at all times. Principles must guide us. Without honor we are nothing. Degeneracy and meaninglessness settles in and poisons our hearts and souls, drags them to the void.

last_10_messages.text:
You are perceptive, enthusiasm is magic. And her enthusiasm is also resilient, which is even rarer magic. Requires appreciation and recognition to be maintained tho, as it should be. We are humans
1. I met her in small group at lunch, as light social interaction lasting half an hour, discussing surface level spirituality. During the same day afterwards, I processed the encounter, and recognised the rarity of her light. Naturally I kidnapped her into my evening, subjecting her to my sorcery, mentorship and hypnosis
She just kept asking what to do and did it right away. Even my long paying clients are fighting themselves, Lea on the other hand fights along herself and consistently progresses
The very next day I was extremely busy, so she got heartbroken with my sudden absence (irregular rewarding is highly addictive, which is why casinos are so irresistible for weak people). What did Lea do with it? Instead of being dramatic, annoying or withdrawing, she utilized my psychological tools from the day before, to find out why is she heartbroken by herself, to harmonize her nervous system and be happy. She self-regulated and then send me a voice message thanking me for the tools and wishing me an exciting evening
So we get on the same page here, that time I hypnotized a woman called Lea, she learned one of my unique techniques from inside the dreamy state and used it on herself the very next day, so not to annoy me
That signals that 1) she is respectful towards my time and attention 2) she is capable of self-regulation when her emotions are chaotic 3) she quickly learns from doing things, even if she never encountered them before 4) she is self-growth oriented 5) she is easy to get along with and is forgiving
2. Our relationship has two contexts. First one is my heart being taken, I already have a woman of two years. Second one is me having experienced electric romance with my apprentices before, and it always closed the doors due to biology. I tried many times, and being lovers overshadows everything. So eventually you become lovers that didnt work out, and any growth and any light becomes just a story around the old romance. Outdated, despite the value
Me and Lea have master to apprentice relationship. She has huge potential in what excites me most: nervous system hacks, dreams, hypnosis, energy work, transformation. But this is my light, and she has to find her own. This includes mastering many sides of herself, which she will do quickest working with you, while bringing value in return
Ideally I would  train her and employ her later in several years, to be one of my nervous system sorcerers, for her to do scientific and esoteric practices on myself and on my clients. But if she will find her own different light, I will be more than satisfied
Quick notes:
1. Lea is still growing, everything excites her. Would you kindly reset her priorities when needed, in loving and respectful form? Just tell her what to focus on, and how to do it, she will follow
2. She has enormous feminine energy, soft, caring and sunlit. Feminine energy needs praise to bloom. Few sentences will ignite her enthusiasm. Simple as: "Lea, I have noticed you did well today, your effort is appreciated. You are bright, you are the best, keep going" or whichever is your style. You can see it as her soul salary, she deserves it already
3. Lea is on a too humble side right now, her nervous system is growing. She will ask for little. Would you kindly be fair to her money-wise? You will know what is her worth. It is time for universe to reward her light (I am talking to your higher self, above the game) It would be even more lovely, if it would be percentage based (if it is sales) so she is rewarded for tenacity and creativity. She needs to learn this lesson
4. Lea is highly conscious and easy to deal with if you are clear, respectful and loving. If you have any issue, just talk to her directly and navigate it together
But in the end this is your business, your empire, and it will be a valuable lesson for all of us, one way or another
Let me know if any other question rises

scott_reply:
That’s a fixed mindset, brother. Sad to see that. That’s not what I taught you. We see the world not as it is but as we are. Never turn into a cynic, viewing the world with such skepticism means that you do not believe in yourself and there’s no sadder thing that rejecting yourself before the world even gets to experience you.
What place? Tribal? Not exactly. I just go for lunch with the people from my network or jump on a call with new potential clients I get online from Adonis’ Library, 50 / 50 between online and IRL.
Don’t fall either for the trap that some self-improvement gurus promote without any real understanding of how human consciousness works. The idea that by acquiring knowledge on an specific field without doing anything about it (this course is action oriented by the way, it’s like manual, a set if instructions, but never mind that, I’m talking about the broader concept and not about this specific piece of information) is a form of procrastination is complete insanity and a very clear sign that they do not understand how the structure of reality itself works. This is how it works: Ideas spark emotions (emotion means energy in motion), emotions fuel our actions.
By acquiring knowledge you build a new paradigm, we must see the world in a different way before we can act upon it in a different way. Seeing, being, doing. You first see, then become and then do.
We cannot do that which is unaligned with what we perceive ourselves to be, and we cannot perceive ourselves to be something without seeing the ideas, values and principles that guide us, even if some people in their unconsciousness and lack of awareness allow other people to project onto them this identity instead of building it consciously by themselves.
Enthusiasm is a powerful kind of magic.
I hope this opens your eyes, brother, you know better than this, don’t forget what you already know… you know this! WAKE UP!!! That’s the Matrix taking over your mind!!! Don’t allow it!!!
Everything flows from the fucking mind! You want to move your arm? Guess how you’re doing it. How do you expect to gain motivation towards something if you don’t consume information about it that inspires you and stir your emotions, emotions are the ones that will fuel your actions.
And there’s something else really important I want you to understand:
Don’t sit there and wait for your purpose or passion to find you. It won’t come magically to you out of nowhere. That’s not how it works. You got to choose to love something, because loving is an action, it’s not a magical emotion that shows up out of nowhere. As a man you must understand that you are the catalyst in the world, this world doesn’t happen TO you, YOU happen to this world. Just like as a woman the world doesn’t happen TO you, instead the world happens FOR you. Understanding this will show you how can women be passive and get the feeling of love (produced by a man) while the man decides to love, feels this boundless lust over a women and becomes the catalyst of this love. But a man’s love dedicated to anything (a woman, a trait, an idea, an object, a skill, a country, a land…) becomes a catalyst for his relentless actions, and you can produce this love… guess how… by making a conscious decision to commit to it, to learn and understand that thing.
This is real!
Be a man!
Don’t wait like a woman for the world to MAKE you feel something. That’s the very basis of feminine energy and by doing that you are growing your feminine instead of becoming more of what you are, which is a MAN.
Don’t allow this world to happen to you or even for you…
YOU ARE THE ONE HAPPENING TO THIS WORLD.
BE PROACTIVE.
Not reactive.
Delusion backed up just by words it’s just delusion but delusion backed up by relentless action… that’s called FAITH, brother. Remember: Duty, Honor and Pride.
.
